feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.content: Swedes will see this and claim their entire society has collapsed. You motherfuckers have no idea how good you have it. Here's the most recent American ethnic data I can find online: >Asian: 5-6% >Black: 12-13% >Hispanic: 18-19% >White: 59-60% Keep in mind, this data is almost certainly excluding a huge number of undocumented Hispanic immigrants or the constantly increasing number of Hispanics who consider themselves to be white, as well as mixed race individuals who consider themselves to be wh

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8345 Fox Edition Previous Thread: >>83722026 F-list is a…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8345 Fox Edition Previous Thread: >>83722026 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles, soli

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: So there's no functional difference between a raider gang and a tribe and the pe…
entry.content: So there's no functional difference between a raider gang and a tribe and the people you gun down without mercy in the bethesda games are the demographic majority of humanity equivalent to hunter-gatherers The problem is you, a complete foreigner, suddenly brute-forcing your way through their land with high end weaponry. Not even the evil colonial NCR is that genocidal towards them

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I should enjoy video games but I can't. I have large backlog on GOG and around 3…
entry.content: I should enjoy video games but I can't. I have large backlog on GOG and around 30 games on Steam backlog but either no emotions at all when taking a look, no desire to act in any way or too afraid to play them after finding out about various problems like EOS, privacy issues and so on. I don't even know if putting game on Windows firewall blockade would work. Now is the season for sales and yet I feel no urge to buy anything at all from my lists, afraid that it would end just the same as with ga

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why is eBay so uncompetitive with AliExpress? An entire month plus 40$ in shippi…
entry.content: Why is eBay so uncompetitive with AliExpress? An entire month plus 40$ in shipping fees to deliver a kilogram to Europe is laughably bad. With AliExpress, you'd get free or inexpensive shipping and less than 2 weeks delivery time. This is a good metaphor for the USA versus China.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Chronovisor and the Dark Web
entry.content: You know what they say, "you can find anything on the Dark web, anything at all". Can you find a real, working Chronovisor on there then if nothing else? Because wouldn't it be sweet to see what dinosaurs actually looked like, what ancient Greek Pankration actually looked like, what Chopin's own piano playing actually sounded like and more? That's what I would want to find out if I had my very own Chronovisor.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: New VMAF version
entry.content: VMAF is a video quality metric developed by Netflix, recently they released a new version ("v1"): https://medium.com/netflix-techblog /vmaf-v1-good-is-not-good-enough-60 d7e4244ea8 https://github.com/Netflix/vmaf/blo b/master/resource/doc/models_v1.md TL;DR: >banding metric CAMBI included >chroma channels included >no-enhancement gain (NEG) mode default >improved motion feature and dedicated models for high-frame-rate content (50/60 fps) Ran a quick test. Source is Netflix_DinnerScene from Xiph,

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /scaly/ - Scaly General #1662
entry.content: Post lewd reptiles and discuss scaly stuff, male or female is fine. Dragons, wyverns, dinosaurs, lizards, snakes, and reptile-folk such as kobolds and Argonians are welcome, on top of other things with scales like sharks as well. Anthros, ferals and human/scaly are allowed, but please, no monstergirls. As some may take a few creative liberties on their creations, do inquire if there's a particular edge case you're unsure about. ============== >Lurking or just reading the FAQ before posting is en

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Static Linux
entry.content: Greetings, im making a source-based linux distro that follows thouroughly the UNIX philosophy >it uses its own custom init system wrote in RUST called prometheus >it uses its own package manager wrote in C called ace (or ace compiles everything) >there are many other utils but i forgot >it also uses musl busybox >and near no-gnu is in the base system Soo yeah.. maybe contribute, try it, whatever.. https://staticlinux.org https://discord.gg/R6yKkYaEWX https://codeberg.org/staticlinux

entry.title: /g/ Technology: If every Western nation mandates real-name ID verification for social media* (to…
entry.content: If every Western nation mandates real-name ID verification for social media* (to "save the children"), then where will Chinese netizens VPN to in order to dodge the Great Firewall? * - a policy long active in China, by the way!

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Nintendo is /v/ Disney
entry.content: It's kinda creepy how eerily similar Shiggy and Nintendo are to Disney even to the point where in later stage of shiggy's career he is leading the creation of them parks. People in the past have made connections to Disney when discussing Nintendo but I truly feel now with the success of the Switch era and the Hollywood movies, Nintendo now has officially become the Disney of video games. You can pint post April 5th 2023 with the launch of the animated Mario movie as the hard date for this shift.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Dark World / DJ Lucas
entry.content: so does anyone actually know what the allegations were against DJ Lucas? It's clear that Dark World kind of disbanded and everyone went in their own directions, and there's bits and pieces in comments sections across the internet saying that Lucas has some SA allegations but he got them wiped from the internet somehow. What actually happened? It's a shame because following Dark World was super fun, lots of creativity coming out of those guys but it seems like it's all fallen apart since this shi

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 80s Movies Suck
entry.content: >Dude! Dude! You just had to be there for the action-packed high testosterone extravaganza of consumerist, soulless goyslop! It was so good bro! Cinema peaked in the 60s and went quickly downhill in the 70s, then you end up with the garish waste that is 80s action and horror movies.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Soulslike clones are an over-saturated market, with few that come to understand …
entry.content: Soulslike clones are an over-saturated market, with few that come to understand the core concepts that makes it great. this is especially so with large companies who wish to create something similar without the soul or essence, It comes evidently clear the ignorance in companies when someone who read too much Alice can come up with a more honest souls-like than so called "professionals" and their limitless budget. When will companies understand what makes the souls series great?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: in retrospect Adam was a real piece of shit manipulating and using raven to perf…
entry.content: in retrospect Adam was a real piece of shit manipulating and using raven to perform eugenics on angels and lying and being a double agent to destroy xion all while pretending to be a friend to eve and lily the way he treats raven reminds me of how miquella treated his sister the good ending being the one where he wins kinda gives me the ick
